---
title: "Mind Palace"
date: "2026-05-09"
description: "A self-contained HTML visualization — CES data exploration with a paired Python pipeline, distilled into one page that runs anywhere."
categories: [project, visualization, data]
path: /mind-palace.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/mind-palace.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the standalone page</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/mind-palace.html");</script>
```
